message:
style(extensions,tests): auto-formatter line wrapping and unused import removal

Apply auto-formatter adjustments to quota engine unit tests in
src/extensions.rs — consolidate multi-line assert comparisons onto single
lines where they fit within line length limits:

- quota_config_strict_below_prompt: collapse split assert!() comparisons
  for max_hostcalls_per_second and max_hostcalls_per_minute
- quota_config_permissive_above_prompt: same consolidation
- quota_check_per_second_limit: collapse check_extension_quota() call
- quota_check_per_minute_limit: same formatting normalization

Remove unused import PackageLockMismatch from
tests/extension_lockfile_provenance.rs (no longer referenced after prior
test refactoring).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 mod common;
 
 use pi::package_manager::{
-    PackageEntryTrustState, PackageLockAction, PackageLockEntry, PackageLockMismatch,
+    PackageEntryTrustState, PackageLockAction, PackageLockEntry,
     PackageLockfile, PackageResolvedProvenance, PackageSourceKind, PACKAGE_LOCK_SCHEMA,
     PACKAGE_TRUST_AUDIT_SCHEMA, digest_package_path, evaluate_lock_transition,
     read_package_lockfile, sort_lock_entries, write_package_lockfile_atomic,
